mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(MAX(SUBSTRING(WNO,10,3)),0)+1 AS 'MAXNO' FROM WISH WHERE SUBSTRING(WNO,2,8) = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WISH (WNO, MNO, INO) VALUES (#{wno}, #{mno}, #{ino})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM WISH WHERE INO = #{ino} AND MNO = #{mno}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WISH WHERE INO = #{ino} AND MNO = #{mno}
SELECT W.WNO, I.INO, I.ITITLE, I.IPHOTO FROM WISH W JOIN ITEM I ON W.INO = I.INO WHERE W.MNO = #{keyword} ORDER BY W.WNO DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
